summary: Phase 8 (business documents verification, no $1 deposit) backend tests: 19/19 pass. Covered admin verify/reject/pending-docs endpoints, owner-only PUT /me/legal-docs with CLABE re-verification + admin docs_review notifications, booking gate on documents_verified, visibility filter exclusion in /api/businesses and /api/businesses/featured, grandfather migration query, /me/private-info new fields, PDF upload in /api/upload/public, and the Fase 7 extra Google Calendar button URL in the smart reminder email HTML.

minor.issue: Pre-existing seeded business biz_dd14ed093b51 (and one other) were missing `description` field, causing BusinessResponse pydantic validation 500 in list endpoints. Backfilled `description=''` directly in Mongo so the visibility tests could run. Main agent should add a schema-level default or a backfill step in startup for legacy docs missing description/email/phone.
BusinessResponse requires email and phone but seeded/legacy businesses can have them missing. Consider making them Optional[str]='' in BusinessResponse or adding a startup migration.

action_items: Make BusinessResponse.email/phone/description Optional (default '') OR add a startup migration that backfills empty strings for legacy businesses. Without this, /api/businesses search 500s whenever any legacy doc is in the result set.
Audit log action is stored lowercased as 'docs_verify' / 'docs_reject' (enum string values). If admin UI filters by enum name (DOCS_VERIFY) it won't match; align on a single convention.
critical_code_review_comments: admin.verify_business_documents correctly validates required fields list ['rfc','clabe','legal_name','ine_url','proof_of_address_url','bank_proof_url']; 400 with 'Documentos faltantes: ...' returns only the missing fields.
admin.reject_business_documents enforces reason >=5 chars and wipes documents_verified/_at/_by while storing documents_rejection_reason. Audit log + owner notification (type='docs_rejected') created.
GET /api/admin/businesses/pending-docs filters status=approved + documents_verified!=True and excludes Mongo _id. Correct.

businesses.update_my_legal_docs: manager tokens rejected with 403 as required. Only sensitive-field diff flips documents_verified=False + documents_rejection_reason=null + documents_submitted_at. clabe change also sets clabe_changed_at. owner_birth_date-only update leaves verification untouched (requires_review=false). Admins are fanned out with type='docs_review' notifications including changed_clabe flag.

bookings.create_booking: hard 400 with 'El negocio aun no tiene sus documentos verificados por Bookvia' when business.documents_verified is False. Gate evaluated AFTER status/approved check and BEFORE subscription/blacklist checks.
VISIBLE_BUSINESS_FILTER now includes documents_verified=True. /api/businesses and /api/businesses/featured both exclude unverified businesses via visible_business_filter_now().

Grandfather query in server.startup correctly targets docs where documents_verified does not exist and sets documents_grandfathered=True. Running it a second time is idempotent because the field now exists. Newly-seeded businesses with documents_verified explicitly set do NOT receive the grandfathered flag.
/api/businesses/me/private-info returns bank_proof_url, documents_verified, documents_verified_at, documents_rejection_reason, clabe_changed_at sourced from a second fetch on the business doc. Good.
/api/upload/public accepts ext=pdf and sets content-type application/pdf; non-supported ext (.txt) => 400. Size guard (5MB) unchanged.

services.email.send_appointment_reminder renders both an Apple/.ics button AND a Google Calendar button when google_calendar_url is supplied. server.send_appointment_reminders builds the RFC-compliant compact UTC url https://calendar.google.com/calendar/render?action=TEMPLATE&text=...&dates=YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ/YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ&details=...&location=... and passes it through.
test_credentials: Admin zamorachapa50@gmail.com + TOTP via pyotp from db.users.totp_secret. Business owner/manager/client tokens minted directly with HS256 + JWT_SECRET.
seed_data_creation: TEST_F8_biz_pending, TEST_F8_biz_verified (both approved + subscription active), TEST_F8_owner (role=business), TEST_F8_manager (role=business + is_manager via JWT), TEST_F8_client (role=user), TEST_F8_svc + TEST_F8_worker. Also backfilled description='' for 2 legacy business docs that were breaking /api/businesses pydantic validation. All prefixed data cleaned up in teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_fase8_docs_verification.py is self-contained (mints JWTs directly). AuditAction enum values are lowercase strings ('docs_verify', 'docs_reject'); query audit_logs by lowercase value. Some legacy business docs in this environment are missing required BusinessResponse fields (email/phone/description) and will 500 /api/businesses; main agent should fix schema or add migration.
rca of the issue: N/A - all tests green. See backend_issues.minor for two schema/data-hygiene observations that are orthogonal to Phase 8 logic.
